title: Remove external redirects and implement in-website authentication

requirements.text: Audit all navigation links, buttons, and anchor tags across the entire frontend and remove or replace any href, window.location, or navigate calls that point to external URLs (outside the app). All navigation must stay within the single-page application using the internal TanStack Router.

quotes: the whole website should not redirect you to other websites

acceptanceCriteria: No link or button in the app causes the browser to navigate to an external domain
The SiteFooter 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link (if present) either opens in a new tab without leaving the app or is removed
All internal navigation uses TanStack Router <Link> or navigate() rather than raw <a href='https://...'> tags that replace the current page

requirements.text: Replace the current Internet Identity authentication flow (which redirects users to identity.ic0.app) with an in-website, modal-based login/signup experience using the existing session-auth system (useSessionAuth). The Login and SignUp pages should be rendered as in-app modal dialogs or inline page sections, never causing a full redirect away from the site. The existing Login.tsx and SignUp.tsx pages can remain but must not trigger external redirects; the Internet Identity login button must not perform an off-site redirect.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Login' or 'Sign Up' in the SiteHeader or any AuthButtons component opens an in-app login dialog/modal or navigates to an internal route — never redirecting to an external identity provider
The useSessionAuth hook's login and signup methods are wired up as the primary auth mechanism
Internet Identity (AuthClient) is not invoked in a way that redirects the user away from the app
After successful login or signup, the user stays on the same domain and is shown their authenticated state without a full page reload to an external URL
Logout clears the session and returns the user to the home page within the app

requirements.text: Update the AuthChangeBanner component in frontend/src/components/layout/AuthChangeBanner.tsx to reflect that in-website authentication is now active and no external redirects occur. Remove or update any messaging that refers to external login redirects being disabled, since that is now the normal expected behavior.

quotes: the whole website should not redirect you to other websites

acceptanceCriteria: AuthChangeBanner no longer references external login redirects as a known limitation
If the banner is no longer needed, it is removed from AppLayout

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
All backend logic must remain in the single actor in backend/main.mo
Do not introduce any external third-party authentication providers
nonGoals: Adding new backend authentication methods beyond what already exists in the session auth system
Redesigning the visual theme or layout of the application
Implementing real-time features or new social features
